# key-chip

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Sonata Hud: current-key chip overlaid on the display, tracking the playback cursor. Reads the shared Score + cursor via useSonata().
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Sonata.Hud` "key-chip" → `KeyChip`
  - Uses: `apps/sonata/shell.Sonata`, `apps/sonata/shell.useSonata`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
